---
title: "Pilot Pipeline - Code Availability"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Packages

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(xml2)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
```

## Configuration

```{r}
# RDF metadata file exported from Zotero
rdf_file <- "PilotItems.rdf"

# Folder containing GROBID TEI-XML files for the pilot articles
xml_folder <- "XML_Pilot"

# Output RDS file to be read by RUN_ME.qmd
output_file <- "pilot-data.rds"
```

## Read metadata from RDF

```{r}
#| echo: false

# Zotero RDF is XML-based — parse it with xml2
rdf_doc <- read_xml(rdf_file)

# Declare all namespaces used in a Zotero RDF export
ns <- c(
  rdf     = "http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#",
  dc      = "http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/",
  dcterms = "http://purl.org/dc/terms/",
  bibo    = "http://purl.org/ontology/bibo/",
  bib     = "http://purl.org/net/biblio#",
  z       = "http://www.zotero.org/namespaces/export#",
  foaf    = "http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/",
  prism   = "http://prismstandard.org/namespaces/1.2/basic/"
)

# Each article is a bib:Article node; fall back to rdf:Description if needed
article_nodes <- xml_find_all(rdf_doc, "//bib:Article", ns)
if (length(article_nodes) == 0)
  article_nodes <- xml_find_all(rdf_doc, "//rdf:Description", ns)

message("Found ", length(article_nodes), " items in RDF file")

# Helper: get text of the first matching child node, or NA
get_text <- function(node, xpath, ns) {
  found <- xml_find_first(node, xpath, ns)
  if (is.na(found)) NA_character_ else trimws(xml_text(found))
}

meta_data <- map_dfr(article_nodes, function(node) {
  title    <- get_text(node, "dc:title", ns)
  abstract <- get_text(node, "dc:description", ns)
  if (is.na(abstract)) abstract <- get_text(node, "dcterms:abstract", ns)

  # DOI: try bibo:doi first, then dc:identifier containing "10."
  doi <- get_text(node, "bibo:doi", ns)
  if (is.na(doi)) {
    identifiers <- xml_text(xml_find_all(node, "dc:identifier", ns))
    doi_match   <- str_extract(identifiers, "10\\.[0-9]{4,}/\\S+")
    doi_match   <- doi_match[!is.na(doi_match)]
    if (length(doi_match) > 0) doi <- doi_match[1]
  }

  tibble(
    title    = title,
    abstract = abstract,
    DOI      = doi
  )
}) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DOI)) %>%           # drop items without a DOI
  mutate(doi_no_slash = gsub("/", "", DOI))

message("Extracted ", nrow(meta_data), " items with a DOI")
```

## Parse TEI XML files

```{r}
#| echo: false

clean_url <- function(url) str_remove_all(url, "[​‌‍­﻿]")

parse_tei_xml <- function(xml_path) {
  tryCatch({
    doc <- read_xml(xml_path)
    ns  <- c(tei = "http://www.tei-c.org/ns/1.0")

    # Title (use as fallback if not in RDF)
    title_node <- xml_find_first(
      doc, "//tei:titleStmt/tei:title[@level='a'][@type='main']", ns)
    if (is.na(title_node))
      title_node <- xml_find_first(doc, "//tei:titleStmt/tei:title", ns)
    title <- if (!is.na(title_node)) trimws(xml_text(title_node)) else NA_character_

    # Abstract (fallback)
    abs_nodes <- xml_find_all(doc, "//tei:profileDesc//tei:abstract//tei:p", ns)
    abstract  <- paste(xml_text(abs_nodes), collapse = " ")
    if (nchar(trimws(abstract)) == 0) abstract <- NA_character_

    # Full text from body + back matter
    body_nodes <- xml_find_all(
      doc, "//tei:body//*[self::tei:p or self::tei:head]", ns)
    back_nodes <- xml_find_all(doc, "//tei:back//tei:p", ns)
    full_text  <- gsub("\n", " ",
      paste(c(xml_text(body_nodes), xml_text(back_nodes)), collapse = " "))

    # URLs: structured ref attributes first, regex fallback
    url_refs        <- xml_find_all(doc, "//*[@type='url']", ns)
    urls_structured <- xml_attr(url_refs, "target")
    urls_structured <- urls_structured[!is.na(urls_structured) & nzchar(urls_structured)]
    urls_structured <- sapply(urls_structured, clean_url, USE.NAMES = FALSE)

    urls_text <- sapply(
      unique(unlist(str_extract_all(
        paste(abstract, full_text), "https?://[^\\s<>\"'\\)\\]]+"))),
      clean_url, USE.NAMES = FALSE)

    all_urls <- unique(c(urls_structured, urls_text))
    all_urls <- all_urls[nzchar(all_urls)]

    # DOI from XML (fallback)
    doi_node <- xml_find_first(doc, "//tei:idno[@type='DOI']", ns)
    doi_xml  <- if (!is.na(doi_node)) trimws(xml_text(doi_node)) else NA_character_

    list(title = title, abstract = abstract, full_text = full_text,
         urls = all_urls, doi_xml = doi_xml)

  }, error = function(e) {
    warning("Failed to parse: ", basename(xml_path), " — ", e$message)
    list(title = NA_character_, abstract = NA_character_, full_text = NA_character_,
         urls = character(0), doi_xml = NA_character_)
  })
}

xml_paths <- list.files(xml_folder,
                        pattern = "\\.(tei\\.xml|xml)$",
                        recursive = TRUE,
                        full.names = TRUE)

message("Found ", length(xml_paths), " XML files in ", xml_folder)

df_fulltext <- map_dfr(xml_paths, function(xml_file) {
  result <- parse_tei_xml(xml_file)

  doi_no_slash <- if (!is.na(result$doi_xml)) {
    gsub("/", "", result$doi_xml)
  } else {
    basename(xml_file) %>% str_replace("\\.(tei\\.xml|xml)$", "")
  }

  tibble(
    doi_no_slash = doi_no_slash,
    title_xml    = result$title,
    abstract_xml = result$abstract,
    full_text    = result$full_text,
    urls         = list(result$urls)
  )
})

message("Parsed ", nrow(df_fulltext), " XML files")
```

## Join metadata with full text

```{r}
full_data <- meta_data %>%
  left_join(df_fulltext, by = "doi_no_slash") %>%
  mutate(
    # RDF metadata takes priority; fall back to XML-extracted values
    title    = coalesce(title, title_xml),
    abstract = coalesce(abstract, abstract_xml),
    `DOI Link` = paste0("https://doi.org/", DOI)
  ) %>%
  select(-title_xml, -abstract_xml)

message(sum(!is.na(full_data$full_text)), " of ", nrow(full_data),
        " articles matched to an XML file")
```

## Keyword definitions

```{r}
key_phrases_exact <- c("code", "script", "osf", "github", "gitlab",
                       "zenodo", "figshare", "supplement", "replicate",
                       "reproduce", "appendix")

key_phrases_gapped <- list(
  c("code", "shared")
)
max_gap <- 3
```

## Extract keyword context

```{r}
extract_keyword_context <- function(text, key_phrases_exact, key_phrases_gapped, max_gap) {
  if (is.na(text) || nchar(trimws(text)) == 0)
    return(tibble(keyword = character(0), context = character(0)))

  exact_pattern   <- paste0("\\b(", paste(key_phrases_exact, collapse = "|"), ")\\b")
  gapped_patterns <- sapply(key_phrases_gapped, function(pair) {
    paste0("\\b", pair[1], "\\b(?:\\s+[\\w,\\.\\!\\?]+){0,", max_gap,
           "}\\s+\\b", pair[2], "\\b")
  })

  combined_pattern <- regex(
    paste(c(exact_pattern, gapped_patterns), collapse = "|"),
    ignore_case = TRUE
  )

  matches <- unlist(str_extract_all(text, combined_pattern))
  if (length(matches) == 0)
    return(tibble(keyword = character(0), context = character(0)))

  sentences <- unlist(strsplit(text, "(?<=[.!?])\\s+", perl = TRUE))

  map_dfr(matches, function(match) {
    idx <- which(str_detect(sentences, regex(match, ignore_case = TRUE)))
    map_dfr(idx, function(i) {
      tibble(
        keyword = match,
        context = paste(na.omit(c(
          if (i > 1) sentences[i - 1] else NA_character_,
          sentences[i],
          if (i < length(sentences)) sentences[i + 1] else NA_character_
        )), collapse = " ")
      )
    })
  })
}

full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(
    keyword_data = map(full_text, ~extract_keyword_context(
      .x, key_phrases_exact, key_phrases_gapped, max_gap)),
    included        = FALSE,
    excluded        = FALSE,
    second_reviewer = FALSE,
    note            = ""
  )

message("Keyword extraction complete")
```

## Save pilot data

```{r}
saveRDS(full_data, file = output_file)
message("Saved ", nrow(full_data), " articles to: ", output_file)
```
